# Implement the following plan

## Instructions

- Read `.github/prompts/conditional-docs.prompt.md` to find existing documentation relevant to your task. If any conditions match, read those docs before implementing.
- Follow existing codebase patterns and conventions.
- Do not skip validation commands — run them all before reporting.
- Double-check your implementation matches every requirement in the plan.
